elections.note: Certified final 204,251 ballots cast (CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Stats by County: precinct 96,269 + VBM 107,982 = 204,251; 52.16% of 391,572 registered). Pre-adoption precinct-based baseline. First-post-poll-close numerator NOT sourceable: Fresno's live GEMS results page (www2.co.fresno.ca.us/2850/Results/) was never captured by the Wayback Machine at an election-night timestamp (CDX shows only post-canvass final files like Results-2010-11-02.pdf, first archived Dec 2012, plus the final SOV text file SOV_2010Nov captured 2024 -- all equal the certified total, useless as a first-report numerator); no press release or news quote of the 8 p.m. first tranche was found. Wayback is reachable here (curl CDX + headless Chrome both work) -- the relevant captures simply do not exist.

Certified final 261,652 ballots cast (CA SoS; precinct 119,543 + VBM 142,109 = 261,652; 63.79% of 410,188 registered). Pre-adoption baseline. First-report numerator not sourceable: Wayback has no election-night capture of Fresno's live GEMS results page (only Results-2012-11-06.htm captured Sep 2015 = final canvass); no news/press-release quote of the 8 p.m. first tranche located. Wayback reachable; election-night captures do not exist.

Certified final 163,420 ballots cast (CA SoS; precinct 64,901 + VBM 98,519 = 163,420; 39.24% of 416,433 registered). Pre-adoption baseline. First-report numerator not sourceable: the earliest Wayback capture of Fresno's per-election results file (Results-2014-11-04.pdf) is Nov 26, 2014 -- 3+ weeks after Election Day (near-final canvass), not the 8 p.m. first tranche; the live overwritten page was not archived on election night, and no news/press-release first-count was found. Wayback reachable; needed captures absent.

Certified final 291,890 ballots cast (CA SoS; election-day 131,787 + VBM 160,103 = 291,890; 66.73% of 437,423 registered). Pre-adoption baseline. First-report numerator not sourceable: Fresno's live GEMS election-night page (www2.co.fresno.ca.us/2850/Results/Results20161108.htm) has ZERO Wayback captures; the dashed final files (results-2016-11-08.pdf, sov_delimited_20161108.txt) were only archived in 2024 (final canvass); no 8 p.m. first-tranche figure found in news. Wayback reachable; election-night captures do not exist.

Certified final 256,972 ballots cast (CA SoS; election-day 93,581 + VBM 163,391 = 256,972; 56.24% of 456,891 registered). Pre-adoption baseline. First-report numerator not sourceable: no Wayback capture of Fresno's live results page on election night 2018; only proxy located is ABC30 (https://abc30.com/fresno-county-elections-ballots-counting-votes/4642191/) reporting 'more than 100,000 ballots still need to be counted' a day or more after Election Day (~76,000 VBM + ~24,000 provisional) -> implies ~157,000 counted as of that day, but that is a day-after running total, not the 8 p.m. first tranche, and late VBM kept arriving, so it is not a valid election-night numerator. Value left null. Wayback reachable; election-night captures absent.

Certified final 221,419 ballots cast (CA SoS; in-person 28,343 + VBM 193,076 = 221,419; 44.28% of 500,076 registered). Post-adoption (VCA vote centers + DFM/EIMS e-pollbooks + automated signature verification). First-report numerator not sourceable: no Wayback capture of Fresno's results page on election night 2022 (Nov 2022 captures of fresnocountyca.gov are homepage redirects only; no /2850 results subtree capture); Fresnoland (Nov 8, 2022) framed election-night results as '30% of total eligible voters' (~193k of 642,412 eligible) and 'about 41,000 ballots have yet to be counted' Wednesday morning -- both are wrong-denominator framings and/or day-after running totals, not the 8 p.m. first tranche -> value left null per definition. Wayback reachable; election-night captures absent.

Certified final 330,932 ballots cast (CA SoS; in-person 63,049 + VBM 267,883 = 330,932; 64.41% of 513,799 registered). Post-adoption. Election-night numerator is a news proxy (no Wayback capture of the live page on election night 2024 -- Nov 2024 fresnocountyca.gov captures are homepage redirects only). ABC30 (article verified verbatim 2026-06): the 'first wave of data' released after polls closed at 8 p.m. 'included all early vote-by-mail ballots, about 150,000'; in-person ballots were tabulated later ('worked past midnight'), with three updates through the night. 150,000/330,932 = 45.33%. Approximate ('about 150,000'), the 8 p.m. first VBM tranche; secondary confidence. Registrar James Kus noted ~100,000 VBM dropped on/after Election Day were still unprocessed Wednesday, which is why this first-tranche share is well below the certified total.
